zh.lifeSummary: 當JOHN DE BARTON II於1395年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾曼徹斯特時，他的父親JOHN DE BARTON I56歲，母親Emmote de Thornborough54歲。他於1415年之前與MAUDE MIDDLETON在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1493年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾米德萊頓享年98歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当JOHN DE BARTON II于1395年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾曼徹斯特时，他的父亲JOHN DE BARTON I56岁，母亲Emmote de Thornborough54岁。他于1415年之前与MAUDE MIDDLETON在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1493年在英国英格兰藍卡爾米德萊頓享年98岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: BARTON
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called with Old English bere or bær ‘barley’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’, i.e. an outlying grange. Compare Barwick . The name is also found in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as de Bartún.

Polish (Bartoń); Czech and Slovak (mainly Bartoň): from a pet form of the personal name Polish Bartłomiej, Czech Bartoloměj, Slovak Bartolomej, from Latin Bartholomaeus (see Bartholomew ). This surname is also found in Germany.

variants.name: Barwick
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Berwick or Barwick, for example in Northumberland, Norfolk, Somerset, and Yorkshire, from Old English bere ‘barley’ + wīc ‘outlying farm building’, i.e. a granary lying some distance away from the main settlement.
North German: habitational name from a place called Berwick, near Soest, in Westphalia.

nameMeanings.name: JOHN
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When JOHN DE BARTON II was born in 1395, in Manchester, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, JOHN DE BARTON I, was 56 and his mother, Emmote de Thornborough, was 54. He married MAUDE MIDDLETON before 1415, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in 1493, in Middleton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 98.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque JOHN DE BARTON II est né en 1395, à Manchester, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, JOHN DE BARTON I, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Emmote de Thornborough, avait 54 ans. Il a épousé MAUDE MIDDLETON avant 1415, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1493, à Middleton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 98 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als JOHN DE BARTON II 1395 in Manchester, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater JOHN DE BARTON I 56 und seine Mutter Emmote de Thornborough 54. Er hat vor 1415 in England MAUDE MIDDLETON geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1493 im Alter von 98 Jahren in Middleton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando JOHN DE BARTON II è nato il nel 1395 nel Manchester, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, JOHN DE BARTON I, aveva 56 anni e il suo madre, Emmote de Thornborough, aveva 54 anni. Lui sposato MAUDE MIDDLETON prima del 1415, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1493, nel Middleton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 98 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: JOHN DE BARTON IIが1395年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスターで生まれた時，父JOHN DE BARTON Iは56歳，母Emmote de Thornboroughは54歳であった。1415年以前にイギリスでMAUDE MIDDLETONと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1493年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアミッドレトンで98歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: JOHN DE BARTON II(이)가 1395년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 먼체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 JOHN DE BARTON I(은)는 56세였고, 그의 어머니 Emmote de Thornborough(은)는 54세였다. 그는 1415년 이전 영국에서 MAUDE MIDDLETON(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1493년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 미들레턴에서 98세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando JOHN DE BARTON II nasceu em 1395, em Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, JOHN DE BARTON I, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Emmote de Thornborough, tinha 54 anos. Ele casou-se com MAUDE MIDDLETON antes 1415, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1493, em Middleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 98 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда JOHN DE BARTON II родился в 1395 г. в местности манчестир, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени JOHN DE BARTON I было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Emmote de Thornborough, 54. Он женился на женщине по имени MAUDE MIDDLETON перед 1415 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1493 г. в местности миддлетон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 98 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando JOHN DE BARTON II nació en 1395, en Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, JOHN DE BARTON I, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Emmote de Thornborough, tenía 54 años. Se casó con MAUDE MIDDLETON antes de 1415, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1493, en Middleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 98 años.
